extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won a textbook sprint leadout on Stage 10, taking his 33rd Tour stage (one from Merckx record) as Deceuninck went 'full gas' despite category 4 climb concerns
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck pre-announced full commitment to chasing despite cat-4 climb, signaling confidence in Cavendish's improved climbing form.
COLBRELLI's mid-stage attack attempting sprint bonus points neutralized by UAE protecting Pogačar's yellow, not by Cavendish's team.
Crosswind sections materialized as forecast but Pogačar isolated with only 1-2 teammates, exposing UAE's flat-stage roster depth weakness.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Team publicly committed to 'full gas' chase despite category 4 climb, suggesting genuine belief his climbing has improved enough for consistent sprint opportunities
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: Isolated with minimal teammates in crosswind moments but personally strong enough to self-position, revealing reliance on individual power over team protection on flat stages
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: Failed breakaway attempt for intermediate sprint points suggests desperation to close 59-point green jersey gap rather than waiting for better stage profile
